de.uka.ilkd.key.macros

Class WellDefinednessMacro

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.AbstractProofMacro
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.StrategyProofMacro
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.WellDefinednessMacro
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofMacro

    public class WellDefinednessMacro
extends StrategyProofMacro
    This macro resolves the well-definedness transformer, i.e. it applies exactly all applicable rules to resolve the operators WD and wd (which are formula/term transformers). These rules all have the prefix defined in WD_PREFIX. The macro is only applicable for proof obligations created in #WellDefinednessPO and the Well-Definedness branches in #WhileInvariantRule and #BlockContractRule.
    Author:
    Michael Kirsten

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      private static class  WellDefinednessMacro.WellDefinednessStrategy
      This strategy accepts all rule apps for which the rule name is a Well-Definedness rule and rejects everything else.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.ProofMacro

      • getName

        public String getName()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the name of this macro. Used as menu entry
        Returns:
        a non-null constant string

      • getCategory

        public String getCategory()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the category of this macro. Used as name of the menu under which the macro is sorted. Return null if no submenu is to be created.
        Returns:
        a constant string, or null

      • getDescription

        public String getDescription()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the description of this macro. Used as tooltip.

      • canApplyTo

        public boolean canApplyTo(Proof proof,
                 ImmutableList<Goal> goals,
                 PosInOccurrence posInOcc)
        Description copied from class: StrategyProofMacro
        Can this macro be applied on the given goals? This method should not make any changes but check if the macro can be applied or not on the given goals. This method may be called from within the GUI thread and be compatible with that fact. This macro can always be applied (does not change anything perhaps) TODO make this only applicable if it has an impact.
        Specified by:
        canApplyTo in interface ProofMacro
        Overrides:
        canApplyTo in class StrategyProofMacro
        Parameters:
        proof - the current Proof (not null)
        goals - the goals (not null)
        posInOcc - the position in occurrence (may be null)
        Returns:
        true, if the macro is allowed to be applied
